chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-281 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 13-05-2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** This petition was filed with a prayer that departmental appeal filed by the petitioner be decided within shortest possible time. Today, counsel for respondents files statement along with order, delivered by Secretary/Chairman Railways and submits that departmental appeal of the petitioner has been decided. Under the circumstances, this petition has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
